# Generated by: aspire sdk dump --format ci

# Handle Types
Aspire.Hosting.Python/Aspire.Hosting.Python.PythonAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.Python/Aspire.Hosting.Python.UvicornAppResource

# Enum Types
enum:Aspire.Hosting.Python.EntrypointType = Executable | Script | Module

# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.Python/addPythonApp(name: string, appDirectory: string, scriptPath: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Python/Aspire.Hosting.Python.PythonAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.Python/addPythonExecutable(name: string, appDirectory: string, executableName: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Python/Aspire.Hosting.Python.PythonAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.Python/addPythonModule(name: string, appDirectory: string, moduleName: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Python/Aspire.Hosting.Python.PythonAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.Python/addUvicornApp(name: string, appDirectory: string, app: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Python/Aspire.Hosting.Python.UvicornAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.Python/withDebugging() -> Aspire.Hosting.Python/Aspire.Hosting.Python.PythonAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.Python/withEntrypoint(entrypointType: enum:Aspire.Hosting.Python.EntrypointType, entrypoint: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Python/Aspire.Hosting.Python.PythonAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.Python/withPip(install?: boolean, installArgs?: string[]) -> Aspire.Hosting.Python/Aspire.Hosting.Python.PythonAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.Python/withUv(install?: boolean, args?: string[]) -> Aspire.Hosting.Python/Aspire.Hosting.Python.PythonAppResource
Aspire.Hosting.Python/withVirtualEnvironment(virtualEnvironmentPath: string, createIfNotExists?: boolean) -> Aspire.Hosting.Python/Aspire.Hosting.Python.PythonAppResource
